ValidationRule.description: מוודא כי הטלפון הראשי הוא לא כשר, אם הוא משמש גם לSMS
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( $User.Id = '0054J000002PIdC' || $User.Id = '0054J000002Q8am' || $User.Id = '0054J000002QSkU' || $User.Id = '0054J000004QaYN' || $User.Id = '0054J000004RQEhQAO' || $User.Id = '0054J000000vlO1QAI') && (((ISNEW() && DisableValidation__c = false) || (NOT(ISNEW()) && NOT(ISCHANGED(DisableValidation__c)))) && Use_for_SMS__c = TRUE && ISPICKVAL( ID_Type__c , "1") && NOT( ISBLANK( Phone )) && ( (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05041") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05271") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05276") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05484") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05485") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05832") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05567") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05331") || (LEFT( Phone, 5) = "05341") )) || (((ISNEW() && DisableValidation__c = false) || NOT(ISCHANGED(DisableValidation__c))) && ISPICKVAL( ID_Type__c , "1") && NOT( ISBLANK( SMS_Phone_Number__c )) && ( (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05041") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05271") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05276") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05484") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05485") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05832") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05567") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05331") || (LEFT( SMS_Phone_Number__c , 5) = "05341") ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: מספר הטלפון שהוקלד לקבלת מסרונים נכלל ברשימת הקומות הכשרות
